zh.lifeSummary: 當Hervey de Glanville於1065年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴時，他的父親Ranulph de Glanville21歲，母親Flandrina de Suffolk20歲。他和Domina Matilda de Castleacre至少有5個兒子。他去世於1147年在英國英格蘭素福爾可艾也享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hervey de Glanville于1065年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可巴时，他的父亲Ranulph de Glanville21岁，母亲Flandrina de Suffolk20岁。他和Domina Matilda de Castleacre至少有5个儿子。他去世于1147年在英国英格兰素福爾可艾也享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Glanville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): of Norman origin, a habitational name from a place so called in Calvados, France, named from an ancient Germanic personal name of uncertain form and meaning + Old French ville ‘settlement’. This name has frequently been confused with Glanfield, a habitational name from Glanvill Farm in Devon, Clanville in Somerset and Hampshire, or Clanfield in Hampshire, or from some other place likewise named with Old English clǣne ‘clean’ (i.e. free of brambles and undergrowth) + feld ‘pasture, open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Hervey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from a Breton personal name composed of haer ‘battle’ + vy ‘worthy’. It was introduced to Britain by Bretons who settled in East Anglia and elsewhere in the wake of the Norman Conquest.

en.lifeSummary: When Hervey de Glanville was born in 1065, in Bawdsey, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ranulph de Glanville, was 21 and his mother, Flandrina de Suffolk, was 20. He had at least 5 sons with Domina Matilda de Castleacre. He died in 1147, in Eye, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hervey de Glanville est né en 1065, à Bawdsey, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ranulph de Glanville, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Flandrina de Suffolk, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Domina Matilda de Castleacre. Il est décédé en 1147, à Eye, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hervey de Glanville 1065 in Bawdsey, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ranulph de Glanville 21 und seine Mutter Flandrina de Suffolk 20. Er hatte mit Domina Matilda de Castleacre mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1147 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Eye, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hervey de Glanville è nato il nel 1065 nel Bawdsey, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ranulph de Glanville, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Flandrina de Suffolk, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Domina Matilda de Castleacre. Morì nel 1147, nel Eye, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hervey de Glanvilleが1065年にイギリスイギリススフォルクバウドセイで生まれた時，父Ranulph de Glanvilleは21歳，母Flandrina de Suffolkは20歳であった。彼はDomina Matilda de Castleacreとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼は1147年にイギリスイギリススフォルクエイで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hervey de Glanville(이)가 1065년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 바w드시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ranulph de Glanville(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Flandrina de Suffolk(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Domina Matilda de Castleacre(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1147년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 예에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hervey de Glanville nasceu em 1065, em Bawdsey, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ranulph de Glanville, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Flandrina de Suffolk, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Domina Matilda de Castleacre. Ele faleceu em 1147, em Eye, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hervey de Glanville родился в 1065 г. в местности бавдси, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ranulph de Glanville было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Flandrina de Suffolk, 20. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Domina Matilda de Castleacre. Он умер в 1147 г. в местности эи, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hervey de Glanville nació en 1065, en Bawdsey, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ranulph de Glanville, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Flandrina de Suffolk, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Domina Matilda de Castleacre. Murió en 1147, en Eye, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años.
